titleStmt.title: SII 38.473: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 473. (A.R. No. 473 of 1912.) TIRUTTUṞAIPPŪṆḌI, TIRUTTURAIPPUNDI TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. On the north wall, maṇḍapa infront of the central shrine, Marundīśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Tribhuvanachakravarttin Rājarāja II Year: 16+1, Rishabha ba. di 5. Saturday, Uttirāḍam, 316th day = 1163-64 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription records an order of kūṭṭaperumakkaḷ and mahājanas of Koṟṟamaṅgalam, a hamlet of Śrīsuttavallich-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Puṟaṅkarambaināḍu (a sub-division) of Rājēndrachōḻa-vaḷanāḍu, to the accountant of the village, Bhaṭṭapiriyaṉ. It mentions that for conducting the early morning service (tiruveḻichchi) of the god Tiruttuṟai-nāyanār, in lieu of the old land which had been utilized till now, a new land had been assigned. The land was of the standard (maḍakku) category and measure kīḻ 3/8. Both the old and new lands are stated to have been originally tax-free (geṟbaṉṉiya-dakshiṇai) meaning of this term is not clear). The newly assigned land was made free of all taxes except a revised antarāya-kāśu i.e., land dues on the lands owned by the temple (tirunāmattukkāṇi).
The village accountant Bhaṭṭapiriyaṉ, Kēśava Bhaṭṭaṉ, Sīgadai Tiruvaraṅga Bhaṭṭaṉ, Tulamaṇivēdavi Kumāra Bhaṭṭaṉ and several others figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī I
rājairājatevarkku yāṇṭu 10 6vatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu
ṛṣapanāyaṟṟu Aparapak(ka)kṣattu pañcamiyum caṉikiḻa(ma)
maiyum peṟṟa Uttirāṭattu koṭṭu ḷa 3 100 10 6ṉāl rāce
ntiracoḻavaḷanāṭṭu puṟaṅkaṟampaināṭṭu śrī cuttaval
liccaruppetimaṅkalattu piṭākai koṟṟamaṅkalattu kū
ṭṭa perumakkaḷum makāceṉamum Eḻuttu nammur kaṇakku vi
ṭṭapiriyaṉRead as paṭṭapiriyaṉkaṇṭu Uṭaiyār tiruttuṟaināya
ṉār tirunāmattukkāṇiyāy varukiṟa nilam kākka
tiyarmaṇivatikku kiḻakku Irācakecarivāykkālu
kku teṟkku 4 kūli 3 catirattu meṟkkaṭaiya nila mu
va nikki Itaṉ kiḻak(ku)keṟpaṉṉiyartekṣaṇai
ṟaiyiliyāy tirunāmattukāṇiyāyvarukiṟa » 8 kku Antarāya
ttukku Iṟuttu varukiṟa maṭakku » kiḻakku mā 8m » �§ catirattu kiḻakkaṭai
» tmakku tarappaṭi maṭakku » m kiḻakkukku mā 8m Āka maṭakku » kiḻakkukku 1araikkāl I
maṭakku nilam kiḻaraiye Araikkālukkum Innāyaṉārkku tiruve
ḻiccippaṭi Amutupaṭi viñcaṉattukku Uṭalāka Iṟaiyiliyāka ni
ṟuttiṉa 3 kūli 3 catirattu meṟkaṭaiya » mā4 nikki Itaṉ kiḻakku tiru
vaṭippiṭikkum pārattuvāci kecavapaṭṭaṉkeṟa paṉṉiyāya dakṣaṇai
Iṟaiyilippaṭivilai koṇṭu Iḷaiyamaṅkalattu
nārāyaṇapaṭṭaṉ perāl niṉṟu varukiṟa » ta 8 � 1muntiri
kiṟāyil Acalpaṟā tarattil Iṟaiyili māṟiṉāl
Iṟukka Iṭṭa maṭakkunikki Iṟaiyiliyāṉa maṭak
kile tirunāmattuiṟaiyiliyāy varukiṟa maṭakku
» kiḻakkukku 1araikkāl Inta maṭakku nilam kiḻaraiye Araikkā
lum tiruveḻuccippaṭikku Amutupaṭikku Uṭalāka Iṟaiyi
li Āka cantarātittavaraiyum niṟkkavum Imaṭakku nilam kiḻa
raiye Araikkālum Inta kecavapaṭṭaṉ Iṟuppu maṭak
ku Uṭaṉe kūṭṭi Iṟukkavum Innilam Orumāvum maṉittā
ṟaiyilikku Antarāyam Iṟuttu varukiṟapaṭi tavirttu teva
rkaḷtirunāmattu Antarāyakācu Iṟuttu varukiṟapaṭiye Iṟukka
vum Allāta viṉiyokaṅkaḷ taviravum Inta kecavapaṭṭaṉ
perkku Iṟaiyili tavirttu Iṟuppāṉapaṭikkum tirunāmat
tukāṇikku Iṟuppu tavirntu Iṟaiyiliyāka niṉṟapaṭikkum
taṉ Eḻuttāl Etirāmāṇṭu kārmutalukku Ippaṭi
peci kattamRead kaccamIṭṭukkuṭukkavum paṇikka paṇiyaāl Ivai
Ūrkaṇakku paṭṭapiriyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi sapaiyār kuṭu
ttaruḷiṉapaṭiye Iṟaiyili kuṭuttu Innilamiṟuppāka
koṇṭamaikku Ivai tiruvaṭi(pi)piṭikkum kecava paṭṭa
ṉṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai cīkatai tiruvaraṅka paṭṭaṉṉe
ḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai tulāmaṇi vetavikumāra paṭṭa
ṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai komaṭattu pacupati paṭṭaṉe
ḻuttu Ivai kāñcai tiruveṇkāṭupaṭṭaṉeḻuttu
Ippaṭikku Ivai kāñcai Arikecavapaṭṭaṉeḻuttu Ippa
ṭikku Ivai tulāmaṇi kecava paṭṭaṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai
tulāmaṇi Ārāamutu paṭṭaṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai tivākara
(kara) paṭṭaṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kāñcai kuṉṟa kumāra paṭṭa
ṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai tulāmaṇi Āḷavantapaṭṭaṉeḻuttu
Ippaṭikku Ivai kāñcai Iḷaiyakuṉṟa kumāra paṭṭaṉeḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 38.473 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
